---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an addition or change
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Which package(s)?**
e.g. @dvgl/orbits

**Problem**
What can't you do today?

**Proposed behavior**
What you'd like, and the smallest version of it that would help.

**Scope check**
dv.gl has published non-goals (no terrain/imagery/GIS, no SPICE runtime, no analysis
engines). If this touches one, say why it still fits.
